name: daily-ai-brief-cost-multiagent-aggressive-haiku-coordinator
description: Cost-optimization candidate #3 COORDINATOR: orchestrates the four-sub-agent decomposition of the daily AI brief (research -> selection -> writing -> listening-script), delegating each phase to its sub-agent rather than doing the skill work itself. Sonnet, orchestration only -- reads recent priors (Step 0), sequences the sub-agents over the shared /workspace working folder, and confirms the four output files. Content generation only; holds no AWS/delivery role. SEPARATE agent resource from the real live production agent (agent_01EswBTose8dnTAUDbGvzdLq) and from every other candidate; syncing/triggering it can never mutate or invoke either.
